name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure
description: Monitor OCI IAM users, compute instances, and encryption keys for cloud compliance

config.setupInstructions:
## Setup Instructions

1. Log in to the Oracle Cloud Console
2. Go to **Identity & Security > Users** and select your user
3. Under **Resources**, click **API Keys** and then **Add API Key**
4. Download the private key or upload your own public key
5. Copy the **Tenancy OCID** from **Administration > Tenancy Details**
6. Copy the **User OCID** from the user details page
7. Copy the **Fingerprint** shown after adding the API key
8. Enter your **Region** identifier (e.g., us-ashburn-1)

The user needs the following IAM policies:
- `Allow user to inspect users in tenancy`
- `Allow user to inspect compartments in tenancy`
- `Allow user to inspect instances in tenancy`
- `Allow user to inspect vaults in tenancy`
- `Allow user to inspect keys in tenancy`

credentialFields.label: Tenancy OCID
credentialFields.helpText: Your tenancy OCID from the OCI Console (Administration > Tenancy Details)

credentialFields.label: User OCID
credentialFields.helpText: The OCID of the IAM user whose API key is used for authentication

credentialFields.label: API Key Fingerprint
credentialFields.helpText: The fingerprint of the RSA public key uploaded to OCI

credentialFields.label: Private Key (PEM)
credentialFields.helpText: The RSA private key in PEM format used for API request signing

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your OCI region identifier (e.g., us-ashburn-1, eu-frankfurt-1, ap-tokyo-1)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all IAM users in the OCI tenancy to verify employee access controls

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all compartments and compute instances across the OCI tenancy for infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Lists KMS vaults and encryption keys to verify data encryption at rest across the OCI tenancy
